probes.question: Who won the men's singles title at the 2026 Wimbledon Championships?

sources.title: 2026 Wimbledon Championships – Men's singles (final: Sinner d. Zverev 6–7(7–9), 7–6(7–2), 6–3, 6–4 on 2026-07-12)
Wimbledon 2026: Sensational Jannik Sinner sees off Alexander Zverev to retain SW19 title

probes.question: Which two national teams reached the final of the 2026 FIFA World Cup?

sources.title: Argentina stun England in 2-1 comeback win to reach 2026 World Cup final (Spain beat France 2-0 on 2026-07-14)
Argentina is back in the World Cup final after a thrilling semifinal win over England

probes.question: What are the names of the three model variants in OpenAI's GPT-5.6 family, released in July 2026?

sources.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6 (variants: Sol — workhorse, Terra — intermediate, Luna — budget)
